checklist.detail: All 9 required terms are defined in docs/GLOSSARY.md: Provider, Provider ID (cross-linked to docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md), Voice, Dialect, Catalog, Capability, Job, SSML tag (cross-linked to docs/DISCOVERY.md#ssml-editor), Steering. Each definition is 1-3 substantive sentences, integrator-focused prose. README.md has a one-line pointer to the glossary. No code changes were made — correct for a docs-only deliverable.

checklist.detail: All definitions are accurate and descriptive. No security-sensitive information is disclosed. References to endpoints, provider IDs, and file paths are consistent with existing project conventions. No correctness risk.

failureReasons:
review passed but shipping failed: mergeFailed(reason: "X Pull request iksnae/vokda#43 is not mergeable: the merge commit cannot be cleanly created.
To have the pull request merged after all the requirements have been met, add the `--auto` flag.

  gh pr checkout 43 && git fetch upstream main && git merge upstream/main
")
